en: Causes villagers to wake up if they're currently sleeping.
Get if a wolfie is angry.
Get the thickness of a dripstone.
Returns the combuster of the event, either a block or an entity.
Get the current boost time of a steerable entity such as a pig or strider. This can be added, set or removed.
Get the directions of a dripstone.
Get the age of tadpole.
Grab the body colour of tropical fishes.
Grab the pattern of tropical fishes.
Check if armour stands have base plates.
Check if armour stands have a marker. A marker means it has a small hitbox.
Check if a axolotl is playing dead.
Check if the bee(s) have a flower location set.

Checks whether an entity has AI.
Check if armour stands are small.
Check if armour stands are visible.
Check if armour stands have arms.
Check if the bee(s) have a hive location set.
Check if the bee(s) have nectar.
Check if the bee(s) have stung before.
Check if the beehives(s) are sedated from a nearby campfire.
Check if the camel(s) are dashing.
Checks if the campfire is in signal fire state.
Check if the berry state of a CaveVines exists.
Check if a horse is carrying a chest.
Check if living entities have their collidable state enabled.
Check if the gateways will teleport entities directly to the exit location instead of finding a nearby location.
Returns if the ender portal frame has an eye of ender in it.
Check if ender crystals are showing the bottom frame.
Check if an entity block storage is full, such as beehives.
Check if entities are climbing.
Check if entities are frozen.
Check if the entities are in a vehicle.
Check if entities are inside a vehicle.
Returns false if the entity has died or been despawned for some other reason.
Check if entities are swimming.
Check if the goat(s) have a left horn.
Check if the goat(s) have a right horn.
Check if the goat(s) are screaming.
Check if an itemframe outline is visible.
Checks if a jukebox has a record inside currently.
Checks if a jukebox is playing a record.
Checks whether an entity is leashed.
Check if the livingentities can pickup items.
Whether to reward experience to the player within a trade of this merchant recipe.
Check if the villager is currently trading with someone.
Check if a minecart will be slow when it's empty.
whether this mob is aware of it's surroundings.
Get the lock state of a repeater. Redstone.
Checks to see if an entity is currently using the Riptide enchantment.
Check if a schulk catalyst is in bloom.
Check if a schulk shrieker can summon.
Check if a schulk shrieker is shrieking.
Marks whether signs can be edited by players.
Gets whether the signs have glowing text.
Check if a steerable entity like a pig of strider have a saddle.
Check if a strider is shivering.
Check if a vex is charging.
Check if entities are displaying that they're on fire.
Checks if a wolfie is angry.
Checks whether the zombie is a baby.
Checks if this entity is in the process of converting to a Drowned as a result of being underwater.
Checks if this entity is in the process of converting to a Villager as a result of being cured.
Returns whether an entity has AI.
Applies the block state of a block to an item.
This is how you apply a banner pattern to a shield. See examples
Set if the armour stands should have arms.
Set if the armour stands should have base plates.
Set it the armour stands should have a marker. A marker means the armour stands have a small hitbox.
Set if the armour stands are small.
Set if the armour stands are visible.
Set the playing dead state of a axolotl. The entity must be underwater and damaged.
Set if bookshelfs slots are occupied by books or not.
Set the collidable state of entities.
Attempts to dispense the contents of the dispensers.
Tries to drop a randomly selected item from the dropper's inventory, following the normal behavior of a dropper..
Set if an ender portal frame has an eye of ender in it.
Set the rotation of entities.
Set the swimming state of entities.
Set the left horn property of a goat.
Set the right horn property of a goat.
Get the item frame visible state.
Stop a jukebox from playing a record.
Whether to reward experience to the player within a trade of this merchant recipe.
Set/removes the spot the recipe should be at.
Set whether this mob is aware of its surroundings.
set/remove the position of a banner pattern.
Set to open or close a lidded block. (Chest, Barrel, Shulker, Etc)
Returns whether an entity can pickup items.
Release all entities from an Entity Block Storage.
Get the bloom property of a sculk catalyst.
Get the can summon property of a sculk shrieker.
Get the shrieking property of a sculk shrieker.
Set if the camel(s) are dashing.
Sets the value of the 'signal_fire' property.
Get the berry state of a CaveVines.
Set if end gateways will teleport entities to the exact location or a nearby location.
Set if ender crystals have a base showing.
Set if a horse is carrying a chest.
Set if minecarts are to be slow when they're empty.
Set if a steerable entity like a pig or strider have a saddle.
Set if striders are to be shivering.
Set the visual fire state of entities.
Sets whether the signs can be edited by players.
Sets whether the signs have glowing text.
Set if vexes are to be charging.
Attempts to make villagers sleep at a given location.
Get the maximum power state for analogue powerable blocks.
Get the power state for analogue powerable blocks.
Get the variant of a axolotl.
Create a banner pattern.
Get banner patterns on a banner.
Get the base color of a banner.
Get all the enities in range of a beacon.
Get the primary potion effect of a beacon.
Get the secondary potion effect of a beacon.
Get the secondary potion effect of a beacon.
Get the tier of a beacon.
Gets the anger level of bee(s).
Gets the ticks of how long bee(s) cannot enter hives.
Gets the flower location of bee(s).
Gets the hive location of bee(s).
Gets if the bee(s) have nectar. Can be set.
Gets if the bee(s) has stung. Can be set.
Get the hive's flower location.
Get the tilt of a Big Dripleaf.
Get block direction of a Directional block.
Returns the BossBar of a Boss. Use this syntax in conjunction with Skellett.
Get or change the items inside a bundle. The bundle must start off as an ItemType.
Collect the total or current cooking time for a slot on the campfires. Not including the word 'total' is the current cooking time.
Collect the item on a slot of the campfires.
Returns the amount of items on the campfire.
Get the candle count of a candle.
The slots that are occupied by books in a chiseled bookshelf.
If the maxiumum of the syntax is used, it'll be the max amount of slots that can be occupied, can't be set.
Gets a mutable set of UUIDs of the entities which are exempt from the entity's collidable rule and which's collision with this entity will behave the opposite of it.
For example if collidable is true and an entity is in the exemptions set then it will not collide with it.
Similarly if collidable is false and an entity is in this set then it will still collide with it.
Returns the combuster of the event, either a block or an entity.
The age of the end gateway.
This is used to determine when the beam is rendered.
The exit location of the end gateways.
The location ender crystal beams are pointing at.
Resetting this expression will make it not beam.

Get the moisture of a farmland block.
Returns the amount of time an entity has been frozen in powdered snow.
Get the tongue target of a frog.
Get the variant of a frog.
Gets the goat screaming state.
Get or change the item flags of an item. The item must be an ItemType
Get the item frame drop chance, can also be modified.
Get the item of an item frame.
Get the rotation of an item frame.
Get the record that is currently playing in a jukebox.
Gets the current actual item inside the jukebox.
Gets the color of a llama.
Gets the inventory of a llama.
Gets the color of a llama.
Gets the strength of a llama.
Get the max candle count of a candle.
Returns the max amount of time an entity has been frozen in powdered snow.
Returns the maximum amount of air the living entity can have in ticks.
Get maximum delay of a repeater. Redstone.
Gets the merchant version of an entity, assuming it's a merchant. Useful for getting their inventory.
Create a new merchant recipe for villagers.
Gets the amount of experience the villager earns from the merchant recipe in trades.
[Khoryl] No official English guide provided.
Get the maximum number of uses this trade has.
Gets the additive price multiplier for the cost of the recipe.
[Khoryl] No official English guide provided.
Get the number of times a merchant recipe trade has been used.
Gets the villagers recipes.
Gets the player a villager is trading with. Returns nothing if they're not trading.
The block data that is displayed inside a minecart.
The damage a minecart deals when getting hit by one.
The velocity at which the minecart derails at.
How much to offset the minecart block display by.
A value of 16 moves the block up by exactly one multiple of its height.
Positive values move the block upwards, while negative values move it downwards.
The velocity at which the minecart's flying velocity will be.
How fast the max minecraft speeds will be.
Get minimum delay of a repeater. Redstone.
The amount of flowers a pink petals patch has
Returns the amount of air that the living entity has remaining in ticks.
Get delay of a repeater. Redstone.
Get the last sculk sensor vibration frequency.
Get the current phase of the sculk sensor.
Get warning level of a Sculk Shrieker block.
Get skull owner of a Skull block.
Gets the size of a slime.
Get all the explored locations of the sniffer(s).
Get delay of a spawner.
Get the max nearby entities allowed for a spawner to spawn entities.
Get the max spawn delay of a spawner.
Get the min spawn delay of a spawner.
Get the spawner spawn count of a spawner.
Get the required nearby players for a spawner to spawn.
Get the spawner spawn count of a spawner.
Get the boost time of a steerable entity such as a pig or strider. This can be added, set or removed.
Get the item used to steer a steerable entity such as a pig or strider.
Grab the pattern colour of tropical fishes.
Gets the trading experience of villagers.
Gets the level of villagers.
Gets the profession of villagers.
Gets the type of villagers. Plains, Snow etc.
Get the anger level of warden towards the entities.
Get the collar color of wolfs.
Gets the amount of ticks until this entity will be converted to a Drowned as a result of being underwater.
Gets the player who initiated the conversion.
Gets the amount of ticks until this entity will be converted to a Villager as a result of being cured.
Gets the profession of zombie villagers.
